quote: A lesson without pain is meaningless. That's because no one can gain without sacrificing something.
Those who forgive themselves, and are able to accept their true nature... They are the strong ones.
Someone who can't sacrifice anything, can't change anything.
I don't want to conquer anything. I just think the person with the most freedom in this whole ocean is the King of the Pirates!
If you use your head, you won't get fat even if you eat sweets.
The universe has a beginning, but no end. Stars are born and die. Galaxies come and go. But the universe remains.
